# Data Source: okta_policies

Get a list of policies from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_policies/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) Policy type: OKTA_SIGN_ON, PASSWORD, MFA_ENROLL, IDP_DISCOVERY, OAUTH_AUTHORIZATION_POLICY, ACCESS_POLICY, PROFILE_ENROLLMENT, etc.

### Optional

- `q` (String) Search by policy name (substring match).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `policies` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `priority` (Number)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
